g.text: FABIO value-added per item for Bosnia and Herzegovina (BIH); items below 3% max |share| of WB across years
are grouped as "Other". Primary (ISIC-A) row: black line = WB ag VA, grey dashed = FABIO-comparable WB (WB
minus seeds and forestry), points coloured by forestry source (see legend). Rows: primary (ISIC-A) vs
FABIO value-added [GLORIA] vs World Bank agricultural value-added — Bosnia and Herzegovina (BIH)
